reference_goals: Channel geometry — serpentine, parallel, pin-fin micro-channel cross-sections
Inlet/outlet manifold — port diameter, O-ring groove, fitting thread boss
Mounting interface — IGBT/MOSFET pad areas, isolation washer pockets, bolt pattern
Cover plate — brazing/FSW joint line, gasket compression stops, flatness datum
Leak test and service — test port boss, drain/bleed plug, witness groove
Thermal interface — thermal pad zone, contact pressure distribution, surface finish callout
needed_metadata: BOM — plate material (6061-T6, copper), cover material, brazing alloy, O-ring compound
Channel hydraulic diameter and pressure drop table
Thermal resistance target (°C/W per device pad)
needed_engineering_docs: CFD boundary conditions — inlet flow rate, inlet temp, heat flux per device pad
FEA boundary conditions — clamping force, thermal cycling range, fatigue life
Manufacturing notes — CNC channel depth tolerance, brazing/FSW parameters (reference only)
safety_boundary: Thermal management design reference only; no high-voltage safety procedures or coolant chemical handling instructions.

crawl_targets.search: cold plate heat sink liquid cooling STEP
